tracks.rawText: 4:28Huehuetl Thunderv5.5Psytrance track with prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, highly rhythmic and hypnotic, magical atmosphere, BPM 145, driving and energetic groove, Prominent ancient flutes like quena and ocarina with rich melodies, fast patterns and layered harmonies, Strong tribal percussion like huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Deep rolling psytrance bassline, psychedelic effects, echo, reverb, and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind sounds, and mystical textures, Ritual chanting elements, The vibe should feel like a powerful ancient ceremony in the jungle under the stars, deeply hypnotic, spiritual, magical and energeticPublishRemix
tracks.title: Huehuetl Thunder

tracks.rawText: 0:32Sledge Reliquaryv5.5Angry ritual groove turned raw and unfiltered: pounding hand drums, taiko-style toms, syncopated conga/bongo patterns, brass hits, and warped temple bells over a driving bassline, Distorted electric guitar, granular synth drones, and shouted gang vocals cut through tape saturation, wide room reverb, and abrupt dropouts for a fierce, ancient-industrial edgePublishRemix
tracks.title: Sledge Reliquary

tracks.rawText: 3:01Sledge Reliquaryv5.5Angry ritual groove turned raw and unfiltered: pounding hand drums, taiko-style toms, syncopated conga/bongo patterns, brass hits, and warped temple bells over a driving bassline, Distorted electric guitar, granular synth drones, and shouted gang vocals cut through tape saturation, wide room reverb, and abrupt dropouts for a fierce, ancient-industrial edgePublishRemix
tracks.title: Sledge Reliquary

tracks.rawText: 4:03Huehuetl Quetzalv5.5Epic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Huehuetl Quetzal

tracks.rawText: 1:49Gold Quantumv5.5Reggae clásico de los años 80 con influencias dancehall, ritmo relajado pero enérgico, bajo profundo y cálido, batería con patrón one-drop, guitarra rítmica con staccato, arreglos con teclados tipo órgano jamaicano y toques de sintetizador vintage, voces melódicascatrinaPublishRemix
tracks.title: Gold Quantum

tracks.title: Gold Quantum

tracks.rawText: 2:17Gold Quantumv5.5Cinematic pop with orchestral elements, Features a prominent syncopated synth bassline with a gritty, distorted texture, Percussion consists of a heavy kick drum on beats 1 and 3, layered with cinematic orchestral percussion and a crisp snare, A clean electric guitar plays palm-muted rhythmic patterns in the verses, Orchestral strings provide staccato accents and sustained melodic counterpoints, The female vocals are powerful and belting, characterized by a wide vibrato and dramatic delivery, The arrangement builds with layered vocal harmonies in the chorus, Key of C minor, Tempo is 85 BPMPublishRemix
tracks.title: Gold Quantum

tracks.rawText: 4:10Gold Quantumv5.5Psychedelic rock, cosmic guitars, swirling analog synths, dreamy atmosphere, hypnotic grooves, vintage tape saturation, trippy reverb, experimental soundscapes, emotional electric guitar solos, ethereal vocals, mind-bending transitions, cinematic psychedelic journey, floating melodies, warm analog textures, spacey echoes, surreal sonic atmosphere, deep bass pulse, progressive arrangements, hallucinogenic vibes, retro-futuristic energy, immersive stereo soundPublishRemix
